title: Venezuelan Cornmeal Empanadas
description: Buttery and crumbly empanadas from Venezuela, perfect as a hangover cure, featuring strong white flour and low carb content, traditionally cooked in an agave leaf vessel
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, cornmeal, and salt
Add cold butter and use a pastry blender to work it into the flour mixture
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and brine
Add the egg mixture to the flour mixture and stir until a dough forms
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces
Roll out each piece into a thin circle
Place a tablespoon of filling in the center of each circle
Fold the dough in half and press the edges to seal
Place the empanadas in an agave leaf vessel or a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
